description: You are an AV technician for a KTV lounge tasked with ingesting three music videos into the venue's karaoke system. Process the files in /home/ga/Videos/ktv_inbox/ (track1_original.mp4, track2_original.mp4, track3_original.mp4) by removing center-panned lead vocals via phase cancellation, overlaying the watermark from /home/ga/Pictures/ktv_logo.png in the bottom-right corner, and embedding the associated lyric files (track1.srt, etc.) as selectable subtitle streams. Save the processed Matroska (MKV) files to /home/ga/Videos/ktv_ready/ as track1_karaoke.mkv, track2_karaoke.mkv, and track3_karaoke.mkv. Create a JSON catalog at /home/ga/Videos/ktv_ready/catalog.json using the schema: {"venue": "Star KTV", "processed_tracks": [{"original_video": "track1_original.mp4", "output_file": "track1_karaoke.mkv", "has_watermark": true, "vocals_removed": true, "subtitles_embedded": true}]}.
